# Integrations

Analysi connects to external security tools via integrations. Each integration has an archetype that defines its role.

## Archetypes

| Archetype | Description | Integrations |
|-----------|-------------|--------------|
| AI | LLM providers for reasoning and embeddings | Anthropic (Claude), Google Gemini, OpenAI |
| SIEM | Security event ingestion and querying | Chronicle, Elasticsearch, Microsoft Sentinel, RSA Security Analytics, Splunk Enterprise, Sumo Logic |
| EDR | Endpoint detection and response | CrowdStrike Falcon, Echo EDR, Microsoft Defender for Endpoint, NetWitness Endpoint, Palo Alto Cortex XDR, SentinelOne |
| ThreatIntel | Threat intelligence feeds and lookups | AbuseIPDB, AlienVault OTX, Chronicle, CrowdStrike Falcon, DomainTools, Shodan, VirusTotal |
| TicketingSystem | Incident and ticket management | JIRA, ServiceNow |
| Communication | Team messaging and notifications | Google Chat, Microsoft Teams |
| IdentityProvider | User and identity management | AD LDAP, Duo Security, Okta |
| NetworkSecurity | Firewalls and network tools | Palo Alto Networks Firewall, ZScaler |
| VulnerabilityManagement | Vulnerability scanning | Nessus, Tenable.io |
| EmailSecurity | Email gateway security | Google Gmail, Microsoft Exchange On-Premises EWS |
| Geolocation | IP and location data | MaxMind GeoIP2 |
| DNS | Domain name resolution services | Global DNS |
| Lakehouse | Data warehouse and lake | Databricks, Google BigQuery |
| DatabaseEnrichment | Database lookup services | NIST NVD |
| Sandbox | Malware analysis sandboxes | CrowdStrike Falcon, urlscan.io |
| AgenticFramework | AI agent orchestration | Anthropic (Claude) |
| Notification | Team messaging and notifications | Slack |

## Available Integrations

### Anthropic (Claude)
- **Archetype**: AI, AgenticFramework
- **Auth**: api_key, oauth_token
- **Tools**: `llm_run` (Single-turn LLM execution: prompt in, string out), `llm_chat` (Multi-turn LLM chat: messages in, message out)
- **Connectors**: health_check
- **Capabilities**: `llm_run`, `llm_chat`

### Google Gemini
- **Archetype**: AI
- **Auth**: api_key
- **Tools**: `llm_run` (Single-turn LLM execution: prompt in, string out), `llm_chat` (Multi-turn LLM chat: messages in, message out), `llm_embed` (Generate text embeddings: text in, vector out)
- **Connectors**: health_check
- **Capabilities**: `llm_run`, `llm_chat`, `llm_embed`

### OpenAI
- **Archetype**: AI
- **Auth**: api_key
- **Tools**: `llm_run` (Single-turn LLM execution: prompt in, string out), `llm_chat` (Multi-turn LLM chat: messages in, message out), `llm_embed` (Generate text embeddings: text in, vector out)
- **Connectors**: health_check
- **Capabilities**: `llm_run`, `llm_chat`, `llm_embed`

- **Capabilities**: `query_events`, `get_alerts`, `add_threat_intel`, `lookup_domain`, `lookup_ip`

- **Auth**: username, password

- **Archetype**: SIEM
- **Auth**: tenant_id, client_id, client_secret
- **Tools**: `list_incidents` (Get all incidents from Sentinel workspace), `get_incident` (Get details of a specific incident), `update_incident` (Update an existing incident), `add_incident_comment` (Add a comment to an incident), `get_incident_entities` (Get all entities associated with an incident), `get_incident_alerts` (Get all alerts for an incident), `run_query` (Execute a KQL query against Log Analytics workspace)
- **Connectors**: health_check
- **Capabilities**: `get_alert_details`, `query_events`, `update_alert_status`, `get_alerts`

- **Auth**: url, username, password
- **Tools**: `list_incidents` (List security incidents within a time frame), `list_alerts` (List security alerts for an incident), `list_events` (List security events for an alert), `list_devices` (List devices connected to RSA Security Analytics)
- **Connectors**: health_check
- **Capabilities**: `query_events`, `get_alerts`

- **Connectors**: health_check, on_poll

## Integration Usage in Cy Scripts

Tools are called with fully qualified names: `app::{integration_id}::{cy_name}`

Examples:
- `app::virustotal::ip_reputation` — look up IP reputation
- `app::splunk::spl_run` — run a Splunk SPL query
- `app::crowdstrike::quarantine_device` — isolate a compromised host
- `app::slack::send_message` — post a message to a Slack channel
